title: Trinkets and Baubles Reforked
description: This is an interesting accessory mod that adds a variety of accessories to Minecraft.
body:
A range of practical and fun accessories are available, all of which can be obtained through crafting.

They have profiles that can be configured according to your needs.

✅ Features: Adding many fresh accessories to the game can make your adventure fun
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76de62fa42e0afe002f8df9fa5dcce007ef4e3e0.png)

This mod is version 1.20.1&1.21.1 of Trinkets and Baubles, and the original mod was:[Trinkets and Baubles](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-and-baubles)
